pages.name: LoginPage
pages.description: Staff and admin login page. Invite-only onboarding means no self-registration link is shown. Users arrive here via invitation email after accepting their invite.

apiCalls.purpose: Authenticate user credentials and obtain JWT token

pages.name: AcceptInvitePage
pages.description: New user onboarding page reached via invitation email link. User sets their name and password to activate their account and join the organisation.

apiCalls.purpose: Submit invite token with user details to activate account and receive JWT
apiCalls.paramSource: Token extracted from URL query parameter ?token=

pages.name: DashboardPage
pages.description: Main dashboard showing current user info, recent executions, and quick access to executable tasks. Entry point after login for all roles.

apiCalls.purpose: Load current user profile and role for role-conditional UI rendering
Load recent executions for dashboard activity feed
Load available active tasks for quick-access task cards

pages.name: TasksPage
pages.description: Task execution interface. Staff search and filter available active tasks by name or category, then select a task to execute. Only tasks the user has permission to access (via permission groups) are shown. Engine details are never displayed.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all accessible active tasks with optional search and category filtering
Load task categories for filter sidebar

pages.name: TaskExecutionPage
pages.description: Task detail and execution interface. Shows task name, description, input guidance, and expected output. Provides input fields and file upload. Displays real-time execution status, results, and download links after completion. Simple ChatGPT-style interaction model.

apiCalls.purpose: Load task details including input guidance and expected output
Submit task execution with user-provided input data
Upload input files to attach to the execution
Poll execution status and retrieve results after submission
Load output file list after execution completes
Generate presigned download URL for result files

pages.name: ActivityPage
pages.description: Unified activity feed across all data sources (agent runs, review items, health findings, inbox items, playbook runs, workflow executions) at org, system, or subaccount scope. Supports filter by type, status, severity, date range, and free-text search. Sort by newest, oldest, severity, or attention_first. Live polling every 10s.

apiCalls.purpose: Load org-scoped activity feed
Load system-scoped activity feed (system admin only)
Load subaccount-scoped activity feed

pages.name: ExecutionDetailPage
pages.description: Detailed view of a single execution including input data, output results, file downloads, timing, and error information. Error detail visible to org_admin only; other roles see sanitised error message.

apiCalls.purpose: Load full execution record including input, output, status, and timing
Load file list attached to this execution
Generate presigned download URL for execution files

pages.name: AdminEnginesPage
pages.description: Workflow engine connection management. Org admin configures n8n connections (baseUrl, apiKey), tests connectivity, and manages engine status. MVP supports one engine per organisation.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all workflow engine connections for the organisation
Create a new workflow engine connection
Update engine connection details or status
Test the engine connection to verify connectivity
Remove a workflow engine connection

pages.name: AdminTasksPage
pages.description: Task management interface for org admin. View all tasks across all statuses, create new tasks, activate or deactivate tasks, and access the task editor. Displays engine, category, and status information.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all tasks across all statuses for admin management
Load categories for task creation and filtering
Load engine connections for task creation engine selector
Create a new task in draft status
Activate a draft or inactive task to make it executable by staff
Deactivate an active task to prevent further executions
Soft delete a task

pages.name: AdminTaskEditPage
pages.description: Task configuration editor. Org admin sets task name, description, endpoint URL, HTTP method, input guidance, expected output, timeout, and category. Includes a test mode panel to execute against the live engine before activation.

apiCalls.purpose: Load full task configuration for editing
Save task configuration changes
Run a test execution against the live engine
Load categories for category selector
Load engine connections for engine selector

pages.name: AdminCategoriesPage
pages.description: Task category management. Org admin creates, edits, and deletes categories. Categories are used to organise tasks and control permission group access.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all task categories for the organisation
Create a new task category with name, description, and colour
Update category name, description, or colour
Soft delete a task category

pages.name: AdminPermissionGroupsPage
pages.description: Permission group overview. Lists all permission groups with member count and category count. Org admin creates new groups and navigates to detail view for membership and category management.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all permission groups with summary information
Create a new permission group
Soft delete a permission group

pages.name: AdminPermissionGroupDetailPage
pages.description: Permission group detail view. Org admin manages group membership (add/remove users) and category access (add/remove task categories). Users can belong to multiple groups.

apiCalls.purpose: Load permission group with full members and category list
Update group name or description
Load all org users for member add selector
Load all categories for category add selector
Add a user to the permission group
Remove a user from the permission group
Grant the group access to a task category
Revoke the group's access to a task category

pages.name: AdminUsersPage
pages.description: User management for org admin. View all organisation users with their role and status. Invite new staff by email, update roles, change status (active/inactive), and remove users.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all users in the organisation with role and status
Send email invitation to new staff member
Update user role or status
Soft delete a user from the organisation

pages.name: SystemOrganisationsPage
pages.description: Platform-wide organisation management for system admin. View all organisations, create new agency accounts (provisioning orgs and their initial org_admin), update plan and status, and suspend or delete organisations.

apiCalls.purpose: Load all organisations across the platform
Provision a new organisation with initial org_admin
Update organisation plan or status (e.g., suspend)
Soft delete an organisation

pages.name: ProfileSettingsPage
pages.description: Personal profile settings for all authenticated users. Update first name, last name, and password. Displays current role and organisation context.

apiCalls.purpose: Load current user profile for display and pre-population of form fields
Save profile updates (name and/or password change)
